ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ssns" (
  "ssn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSN record */,
  "ssn_number" TEXT /* Full SSN number (partially masked for security) */,
  "first_4_digits" TEXT /* First four digits of the SSN */,
  "last_4_digits" TEXT /* Last four digits of the SSN */,
  "first_year_issued" INTEGER /* First year the SSN was issued */,
  "last_year_issued" TEXT /* Last year the SSN was issued (may be 'unknown') */,
  "estimated_age_range" TEXT /* Estimated age range of the cardholder */,
  "valid_ssn" TEXT /* Validation status of the SSN (Valid or Invalid) */,
  "cardholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cardholder associated with the SSN */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the cardholder */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the cardholder */,
  "ssn_status" TEXT /* Current status of the SSN (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "issuance_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the SSN has been issued */,
  "last_issuance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last issuance */,
  "last_issuance_location" TEXT /* Location of the last issuance */,
  "last_issuance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the last issuance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ssn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ssns_cardholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("cardholder_id") REFERENCES cardholders ("cardholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardholders" (
  "cardholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cardholder */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the cardholder */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the cardholder */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the cardholder */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cardholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the cardholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the cardholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the cardholder */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the cardholder */,
  "ssn_status" TEXT /* Current status of the SSN associated with the cardholder */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the cardholder */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the cardholder */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the cardholder */,
  "dependents_count" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the cardholder has */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the cardholder's photo for verification purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cardholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuance_history" (
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuance event */,
  "ssn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSN being issued */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the SSN was issued */,
  "issue_location" TEXT /* Location where the SSN was issued */,
  "issue_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the issuance (e.g., new card, replacement) */,
  "issuance_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the SSN has been issued up to the current event */,
  "previous_issuance_date" TEXT /* Date of the previous issuance */,
  "previous_issuance_location" TEXT /* Location of the previous issuance */,
  "previous_issuance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the previous issuance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issuance_history_ssn_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssn_id") REFERENCES ssns ("ssn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issuance_history_issue_reason FOREIGN KEY ("issue_reason") REFERENCES issue_reasons ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_estimations" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age estimation */,
  "ssn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSN for which the age is estimated */,
  "estimated_age_range" TEXT /* Estimated age range of the cardholder */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the age range */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the age estimation */,
  "date_estimated" TEXT /* Date when the age estimation was calculated */,
  "estimation_source" TEXT /* Source of the age estimation (e.g., SSN, external data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_estimations_ssn_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssn_id") REFERENCES ssns ("ssn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_estimations_calculation_method FOREIGN KEY ("calculation_method") REFERENCES age_calculation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_estimations_confidence_level FOREIGN KEY ("confidence_level") REFERENCES confidence_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log */,
  "ssn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSN being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the SSN was validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (Valid or Invalid) */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes made during the validation process */,
  "validation_source" TEXT /* Source of the validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_ssn_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssn_id") REFERENCES ssns ("ssn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., validator, admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ssn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSN being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the SSN */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the SSN was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, validate, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes made during the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ssn_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssn_id") REFERENCES ssns ("ssn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud report */,
  "ssn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSN being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the fraud was reported */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the fraud */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the suspected fraud */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user investigating the fraud report */,
  "investigation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation started */,
  "investigation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation ended */,
  "investigation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes made during the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_reports_ssn_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssn_id") REFERENCES ssns ("ssn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_reports_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue reason (e.g., new card, replacement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_calculation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age calculation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the calculation method (e.g., Year-based, Range-based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calculation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the confidence level (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)
